MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, not contested, and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Slakey Brothers, Inc.'s Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Plaintiff filed an objection based on untimely filing.

Defendant e-filed the notice of motion on September 26, 2022. Notice of motion was required to be served on all other parties by September 23, 2022. (C.C.P. section 437(a)(2), 12c(a), 12a(a).) September 23, 2022 was a court holiday. (C.C.P. section 135; Govt. Code 6700.) Notice of motion was therefore required to be served on all other parties by September 22, 2022. (C.C.P. section 12a(a).) If served by e-filing, two additional court days extended the period to September 20, 2022. (C.C.P. section 1010.6(a)(4)(B).) Defendant's motion is untimely for failure to serve notice of motion within the mandatory statutory time limits. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (C.C.P. section 12a(a).) If served by e-filing, two additional court days extended the period to September 20, 2022. (C.C.P. section 1010.6(a)(4)(B).) Defendant's motion is untimely for failure to serve notice of motion within the mandatory statutory time limits. Defendant's oral motion for relief under CCP 473(b) and (c) is denied.
